allow: PowerShell($pio = Get-Command pio -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($pio\) { $pio.Source } else { "PIO_NOT_IN_PATH" })

PowerShell($candidates = @\("$env:USERPROFILE\\.platformio\\penv\\Scripts\\pio.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\PlatformIO\\penv\\Scripts\\pio.exe"\); foreach \($p in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } else { Write-Output "missing: $p" } })
